name: Buffalo Chicken Wings with Blue Cheese Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Blue cheese, Roquefort or Gorgonzola
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add hot sauce and remove from heat.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan or deep-fat fryer to 375°F (190°C). Fry chicken wings in batches, without crowding, until golden brown, about 10 to 15 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
3. Brush the cooked wings with spicy butter mixture and serve warm with blue cheese dipping sauce.
Sauce:
In a small bowl, mash the blue cheese until it has some clumps. Whisk in the mayonnaise until blended. Add sour cream and mix well. Stir in lemon juice, wine vinegar, and hot pepper sauce until fully combined. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
